overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character sitting on a wooden dock, gazing across a misty lake at a massive gothic castle perched on rocky cliffs. The scene features atmospheric morning lighting with subtle character idle animations against a static, contemplative backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock overlooking lake and gothic castle

events.description: character leans forward while sitting, adjusting posture to look more intently at the castle
character shifts shoulders and turns head slightly to the right, then returns to forward gaze

agents.ego_description: sitting on the edge of the wooden dock, gazing across the calm lake at the distant castle, occasionally shifting posture and looking around

entered.detail: massive gothic castle with multiple spires and towers perched on rocky cliffs across the lake
weathered wooden planks of the dock surface extending into the foreground
ornate carved stone post at the left edge of the dock framing the view
ornate carved stone post at the right edge of the dock framing the view
calm reflective water surface with subtle ripples between dock and castle
rolling forested hills and mountains visible behind and to the right of the castle

segments.scene_description: A static, contemplative scene from a wooden dock looking across a misty lake to a massive gothic castle. The character sits peacefully on the dock edge, occasionally shifting position, while soft morning light creates atmospheric depth. Stone pillars frame the foreground, and the castle dominates the distant view across the calm water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative perspective from a wooden dock that emphasizes the vast scale of a gothic castle across a misty lake. It begins with a view framed by stone pillars in the foreground, where a character sits peacefully on the edge of the dock. As the character occasionally shifts position, the soft morning light enhances the atmospheric depth of the calm water. The scene remains focused on this quiet moment of reflection, with the massive castle dominating the distant horizon under a hazy sky.
